title: Package Read-Only Generated Adapter Closeout
summary: #362 extended generated adapter migration beyond the root command by generating planning package `status` adapter metadata and routing planning status dispatch through it. The command adapter contract records memory `status` as the next package surface. #363 remains open for multi-adapter projection requirements, and #356 remains open as the parent lane.

issue_classifications.title: [Workspace]: Extend generated adapter migration to planning and memory command surfaces
[Workspace]: Generate shipped CLI adapters from authoritative package definitions
issue_classifications.evidence: #362 landed the first package read-only generated adapter; #363 remains open for projection requirements.

issue_classifications.title: [Workspace]: Define multi-adapter projection requirements for generated command surfaces
issue_classifications.evidence: Root and planning package generated outputs now exist; projection requirements remain the next planned slice.
